daily.today_energy: Mercury's vibes are hitting different today, Virgo. You're radiating clarity and quiet confidence. Trust the little intuitive nudges you've been ignoring—they're actually onto something real.
daily.love: Whether you're coupled or single, authenticity is your superpower rn. Someone notices when you drop the overthinking and just *be*. Real connection happens in those unguarded moments.
daily.career: Your attention to detail is about to pay off in unexpected ways. Don't sleep on that random idea bouncing around your head—it's got legs. Your energy is magnetic for collaboration today.
daily.health: Your nervous system is asking for gentleness, not another productivity hack. A slow walk, some water, or literally just sitting still counts as self-care. You don't need to earn rest.

weekly.overview: This week's energy is giving grounded but curious vibes, Virgo. Mercury's moving in your favor, so your communication is chef's kiss. Trust your gut when making decisions—it's rarely wrong. Perfect time to close old chapters.
weekly.love: Someone's been noticing your quiet confidence, and honestly, it's magnetic. If you're coupled up, vulnerability with your person hits different right now. Single? Don't force it, but stay open. The universe is cooking something.
weekly.career: Your attention to detail is about to pay off big time. Collaboration over solo grinding this week—your ideas paired with others' energy create magic. Set boundaries though; not every task needs your genius energy.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for consistency, not intensity. Gentle movement, hydration, and actually getting sleep will shift how you feel. Notice what drains you versus what fills your cup. Small shifts, big differences.
